Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d=sys.stdin.read\(\); print\('LOGIN OK' if 'login' in d.lower\(\) and 'error' not in d[:500].lower\(\) else 'LOGIN ERROR: ' + d[:300]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(c['name'], '- status values:', next\(\(f['options'].get\('values','?'\) for f in c.get\('fields',[]\) if f['name']=='status'\), 'no status field'\)\) for c in data.get\('items',[]\)]")
